title: v2 operation status snapshot
description: Body a plugin returns for GET {base_url}{endpoints.operation_status}, where endpoints.operation_status is the manifest-advertised path template itself (e.g. '/operations/{operation_id}'), resolved against the plugin's base_url — not a further path appended after it (see schemas/manifest.schema.json, openapi/plugin-api.yaml, and docs/protocol.md). Same semantic shape as completion-event.schema.json, but sequence is non-negative: sequence 0 represents the synchronous snapshot available immediately after invoke accepted the operation, before any completion event has been delivered over the callback (invoke itself creates no outbox event). By construction, sequence 0 always reports state awaiting_user.

event_id.description: Identifier of the latest event reflected by this snapshot. For sequence 0 (no completion event has been delivered yet), this is a plugin-assigned, deterministic snapshot identifier scoped to the operation — a documented placeholder value that keeps this schema isomorphic with completion-event.schema.json. It MUST never be represented as, or confused with, a delivered callback event_id.
